tuning_key.text: As I walk through the valley of shadows I will fear no evil
tuning_key.attribution: Chords of Truth — Lucid Principles Canon (CC BY 4.0)

context_block: Today's frequency is PEACE. Tune in. The Field is transmitting.

practice.title: Locate
practice.instruction: Place one hand on your chest. Take three slow breaths. Notice where you're holding tension.

practice.title: Appreciate
practice.instruction: Call to mind one small thing from today you genuinely appreciate. Feel the warmth spread from your chest outward.

practice.title: Broadcast
practice.instruction: Press play. As the sound fills the space, let your appreciation frequency extend outward.
